name: Golf-In
about: Golf-In is an indoor facility in Wichita, KS featuring two Uneekor golf simulator bays with E6 Connect software. The 2400 sq ft building also houses a Soccer Stars indoor soccer field and is available for event rentals. The simulators offer access to 100 virtual courses, including 18 ranked in the Top 100 Courses in America. Pricing is a flat hourly rate per bay, with advance booking recommended. The facility is focused on providing a space for golf practice, play, and social events, emphasizing technology and group activities.
why_golfers_like_it: State-of-the-art Uneekor Optic technology providing accurate ball and club data
Access to 100 prestigious virtual courses including 18 ranked in the Top 100 in America
Flexible indoor facility accommodating both serious practice and social events
Clear and simple flat-rate hourly pricing structure

food_and_drink.notes: Customers are able to bring in their own food for events and parties
No mention of alcohol service; customers can bring their own drinks for events

simulator_hardware.notes: Optic technology; provides wide-range of ball and club data

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, the facility does not rent clubs.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Yes, customers can bring in their own food and drinks for events and parties. However, no food or drinks are allowed in the simulator bay areas, and no glass is permitted.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: It takes approximately one hour to play 18 holes, per person.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the facility is family-friendly and offers a Soccer Box field for kids. It is available for birthday parties and other events suitable for all ages.
